fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this message exchange

fields.name: sender
fields.description: Originating department sending the account balances snapshot

fields.name: recipient
fields.description: Destination department receiving the account balances snapshot

fields.name: sent_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the message was sent

fields.name: summary
fields.description: High-level description of the message content and purpose

fields.name: account_balances
fields.description: Collection of account balance records for credit review purposes

children.name: account_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the bank account

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer who owns the account

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the account

children.name: balance
children.description: Current account balance; negative for credit card accounts indicates amount owed

children.name: available_balance
children.description: Amount available for withdrawal or spending after pending transactions

children.name: pending_transactions
children.description: List of transactions awaiting settlement that affect available balance

children.name: txn_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the pending transaction

children.name: amount
children.description: Transaction amount in the account currency

children.name: last_updated
children.description: Timestamp of the most recent balance update for this account

children.name: account_status
children.description: Current operational status of the account

children.name: branch_code
children.description: Branch identifier where the account is held
